choices.title: Who are you and what are you doing here?

choice.title: STR_SAY_PLAYER
choice.response: Ok, and what are you doing here?

choice.title: STR_SAY_ALIAS
choice.response: Ok, and what are you doing here?

choices.title: What are you doing here?

choice.title: I found this album and was told to shove it...
choice.response: Oh, I suppose you want to know what it is?

choices.title: So, do you want to know what it is?

choice.title: STR_YES_PLEASE
choice.response: It's a game.

choices.title: So, about the game.

choice.title: A game?
choice.response: Yes, a game where you collect cards...

choices.title: So, you collect cards.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: You create a deck from those cards...

choices.title: So, about the deck of cards.

choice.title: Then what?
choice.response: Use the album and talk to me again.

choices.title: You're back, good!

choice.title: How do I play the game?
choice.response: Do you see that pile of skulls behind me?

choices.title: So, about the game.

choice.title: STR_YES
choice.response: Use the pile of skulls and talk to me again.

choices.title: You're back, very good!

choice.title: Where can I find more skull piles?
choice.response: They're everywhere.

choices.title: So, about the skull piles.

choice.title: I haven't seen them anywhere.
choice.response: You haven't known what to look for.

choices.title: So, about the skull piles.

choice.title: Is there anything else I need to know?
choice.response: Just one thing.

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: And what is that?
choice.response: If you happen to lose a game...

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: There is a good chance that you will die.

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Wait, what?
choice.response: You can die in real life if you lose the game.

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Uhh, for real?
choice.response: Yes, all damage you take in the game...

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Uhuh.
choice.response: Whether it's restored or not...

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Hmm.
choice.response: Is directly transferred to you if you lose.

choices.title: So, the thing you need to know.

choice.title: Ok, I get it, losing is bad.
choice.response: Good, now let me continue my studies.

choice.title: Wow, that's crazy.
choice.response: Crazy? Imagine paying for gender studies.

choices.title: So, what now.

choice.title: Nah, I think you're done here!

choices.title: finish_quest
